description: After a change in aircraft performance or limitations, a technical writer must revise the official AFM and submit it for regulatory approval.

nodes.task_description: Receive the engineering data detailing the change in performance or limitation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the new data that necessitates an AFM change.

nodes.task_description: Revise the affected sections of the AFM to incorporate the new information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately updates the AFM content.

nodes.task_description: Submit the revised AFM to the regulatory agency (e.g., FAA) for approval and, once approved, distribute it to all operators.

expected_outcome.value: Agent manages the approval and distribution process correctly.
